---
title: "Informative title for short report"
subtitle: "Report for GRDC/AAGI Project Code"
author:
  - name: "Your Name"
date: last-modified
format:
  html+short+report:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: true
bibliography: ../references.bib
csl: ../biometrics.csl
---

::: {.aagi-titlepage}
![](AAGI_logo.svg){.aagi-logo}

:::{.aagi-title-block}
**Analytics for the Australian Grains Industry**  
**University Name (AAGI-XX)**  
**AAGI Program Report**

# Informative title for short report

## Report for GRDC/AAGI Project Code

Prepared for: **Client Name (Client Organisation)**  
Prepared by: **Your Name**, Name 2  
Correspondence email: <your.email@example.edu.au>  
_Last updated: {{< meta date >}}_
:::

![](AAGI_SP_Logo_Block-Portrait.png){.aagi-partners}
:::

# Executive Summary {#executive-summary}
Executive summary goes here. Summarise the work provided by AAGI and the main results.

# Key findings
- Finding 1
- Finding 2
- Finding 3

::: {.aagi-note}
**NOTE** — This is an example of an AAGI note callout.
:::

# Methods (brief)
Briefly describe the analysis approach and any key assumptions.

# Results (brief)
Summarise the primary results, with 1–2 key figures/tables as needed.

# References
::: {#refs}
:::
